intentSynonyms: add a ticket comment in zendesk
add a comment to a ticket in zendesk
description: Add a comment to an existing support ticket. Comments can be public (visible to the requester) or private (internal notes for agents only). Returns the updated ticket with the new comment.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to add a comment to

public.description: Whether the comment is public (visible to requester) or private (internal note). Default is true.
